reference: I have recently been having sweating problems ever since I had pain in my left underarm, and now recently this morning I found a lump. What could it be? I do not have insurance, but I plan on attending the hospital. Is it really a serious matter or should I wait it out?
text: I have recently been having sweating problems ever since I had pain in my left underarm, and now recently this morning I found a lump. What could it be? I do not have insurance, but I plan on attending the hospital. Is it really a serious matter, or should I wait it out?
